---
name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: Report an issue to help improve MCP Studio
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

### Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of the bug.

### Steps to Reproduce
1. Command run (e.g. `npx ...`)
2. Actions performed in UI
3. See error output in Console

### Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

### System Configuration
- OS: [e.g. macOS, Windows 11]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Tauri desktop runtime]
- Node Version: [e.g. v20.10.0]
- MCP Studio Package Version: [e.g. v0.1.0]

### Additional Logs
Paste any logs from the MCP Studio logs tab or stderr stream.
